hooks.command: before=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); git pull --ff-only >/dev/null 2>&1; code=$?; after=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then m="could not fast-forward (diverged or uncommitted changes blocking) - pull by hand"; elif [ "$before" = "$after" ]; then m="already up to date"; else n=$(git rev-list --count "$before..$after" 2>/dev/null); m="pulled $n new commit(s) - review before continuing"; fi; printf '{"systemMessage":"sentence-forge: %s","suppressOutput":true}' "$m"
